behavior_summary: Provides a short examine/U8P_RAT::look response for the Rat: when the engine triggers the U8P_RAT::look process, the Rat emits a single bark "skellot" and then the process yields/suspends.

Handles incoming hits via U8P_RAT::gotHit(uword, word): the routine inspects its parameters, ensures the NPC is not dead, and under certain numeric/weight conditions plays a hit sound and forwards a hit to an item (calls Item::receiveHit).

The hit handler appears to treat the first parameter as an item or hit-source reference (used for weight queries and being targeted for Item::receiveHit) and uses the NPC reference (this) to check death state and a numeric threshold before applying item damage.
notable_control_flow: U8P_RAT::look: single linear flow — emit Bark("skellot") then suspend/yield; no flags or external calls.

U8P_RAT::gotHit: conditional flow — store param1 into local1 and this into local2, test a numeric threshold and call Npc::isDead(addressof(local2)). If the NPC is alive and other checks pass, query Item::getWeightIncludingContents(addressof(local1)) and/or compare local1 == 1; if weight>3 or local1==1 then call playSFX(0x55) and Item::receiveHit(...) to damage/affect the item.
open_questions: Precise meanings of the numeric constants and comparisons in U8P_RAT::gotHit (e.g., the threshold tested against 'this' and the literal values) — inferred but not certain.
Exact semantic role of the second parameter (word) to U8P_RAT::gotHit: whether it is direct damage, attacker id, or another flag is unclear.
Whether local1 always references an Item instance, an equipment slot id, or sometimes a sentinel value (0xFFFFFFFF) in other contexts — inferred from usage but not guaranteed.

main_function.name: U8P_RAT::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examine/U8P_RAT::look response for the Rat by emitting a single bark and suspending the U8P_RAT::look process.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player examines/looks at the Rat (process type 0x0208 / 'U8P_RAT::look' event).

function_map.name: U8P_RAT::look
function_map.role: Examine/U8P_RAT::look handler that emits a short bark and ends the process.

function_map.name: U8P_RAT::gotHit
function_map.role: Incoming-hit handler that inspects hit parameters, guards on NPC death/state, may play a sound, and forwards damage to an item via Item::receiveHit.

external_calls.purpose: Check whether the Rat (local2 / this) is dead; used to skip further hit handling if dead.
Query the weight of the item referenced by local1 to decide whether to play a sound and apply Item::receiveHit.
Play a hit-related sound effect (id 0x55) when item-damage conditions are met.
Apply damage/effect to the referenced item (passes several constant args and this) as a result of the hit forwarding.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides a short examine/U8P_RAT::look response for the Rat: when the engine triggers the U8P_RAT::look process, the Rat emits a single bark "skellot" and then the process yields/suspends.
